form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2 lengths at this track over 401m (22.89) beating Sell Your Soul in Grade 5 on April 1. Can make it two on the bounce.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th on April 1 over 520m at this track behind Raymar Shame beaten 11 lengths (30.74) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished second at Gunnedah latest but prior to that recorded a good 22.75 over 401m finishing second at this track. Can measure up with a repeat run two back.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (22.56) at big odds over 400m at Bulli. Awkwardly drawn and will need to find best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the run to the first turn crowded for room and came together.
Came together in the turn to the home straight and again in the home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.88) when sixth over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 3/4. Has six minors from 10 starts from box 5. Looking to others.
